extortion.description: [AI generated] Slchc.edu, or St. Louis College of Health Careers, is an educational institution in St. Louis, Missouri, USA that offers quality educational programs for people seeking to enter the healthcare industry. They offer several degree and diploma programs in areas such as Medical Assisting, Pharmacy Technician, Practical Nursing, amongst others. The institution is accredited by the Accrediting Bureau of Health Education Schools (ABHES).
